nl_query: For each active scanner device, show the device name, campus, total scripts scanned this month, number of rescans performed, average OCR confidence of pages scanned, and the timestamp of the last scan, filtering devices with zero scans.
failed_sql:
SELECT sd.device_name, au.name AS academic_unit, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) AS total_scripts_scanned, SUM(CASE WHEN sh.replaced_previous THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rescans_performed, AVG(sp.extracted_metadata->>'confidence') AS average_ocr_confidence, MAX(sh.scanned_at) AS last_scan_timestamp
FROM   scanner_device sd
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = sd.campus_id
JOIN   scan_history sh ON sh.device_id = sd.id
JOIN   answer_script asp ON asp.id = sh.script_id
JOIN   script_page sp ON sp.script_id = asp.id
WHERE  sd.is_active = TRUE
  AND sh.scanned_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 month'
GROUP  BY sd.device_name, au.name
HAVING total_scripts_scanned = 0
ORDER  BY last_scan_timestamp DESC;
